Codex plugin survival audit

Coqid-game

Score plugin usefulness with local sample data in a high-stakes survival board. Recommendations are review-only and never delete plugins.

Coqid-game only recommends review. It does not delete, uninstall, disable, or modify plugins.

Global Arena

Anonymous sample ranking for comparing your local plugins against a world-style board.
